# Guitar Practice Companion

> A free mobile and web app for structured guitar practice. Includes an auto-ramping metronome, major scale fretboard visualizer, 8 picking and dexterity drills, and a daily practice log with streak tracking.

## What is this app?

Guitar Practice Companion helps guitarists practice smarter with structured, tempo-based routines. It is built for intermediate to advanced players who want measurable, scientific improvement — not just unstructured noodling.

The app is available for free on:
- iOS: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/guitar-practice-companion/id6778313335
- Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.guitarapp.practice
- Web: https://guitar.brilworks.com

## Core Features

### Auto-Ramping Metronome
A high-precision lookahead metronome that automatically increases tempo from a starting BPM to a target BPM over a set interval. This progressive overload approach is the most effective way to build clean speed on guitar.

### Major Scale Fretboard Visualizer
Interactive fretboard diagrams for 6 major scales: C, G, D, A, E, and B. Shows multiple fingering positions so players can memorize patterns across the entire neck.

### 8 Picking and Dexterity Drills
- Right-hand alternate picking exercises (down-up strokes)
- Left-hand spider drills for finger independence
- Melodic Alankar patterns for advanced picking coordination
- Each drill integrates with the auto-ramping metronome

### Daily Practice Log
Log achieved BPM, completed exercises, and notes after each session. Track daily streaks and weekly practice goals (default: 7 hours/week).

## Who is this for?

- Intermediate guitarists wanting to increase picking speed (80–200+ BPM range)
- Students learning major scale positions on the fretboard
- Players who want structured, accountable daily practice routines
- Anyone who wants a free, offline, private alternative to paid guitar apps

## Privacy

Guitar Practice Companion collects zero personal data. All practice data is stored locally on the user's device via AsyncStorage. No account, no sign-up, no server. Fully COPPA and GDPR compliant.

## Technical Details

- Built with React Native + Expo Router
- Available on iOS 15+, Android 8+, and as a Progressive Web App
- Offline-first architecture
- Open-source inspiration from: precision audio scheduling, lookahead metronome algorithms

## Contact

Website: https://guitar.brilworks.com

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: Is the app free?**
A: Yes. Completely free. No subscription, no ads, no in-app purchases.

**Q: Does it work offline?**
A: Yes. The iOS and Android apps are fully offline. The web version requires an initial load but caches locally.

**Q: What BPM range does the metronome support?**
A: The metronome supports the full practical range needed for guitar — from 40 BPM (slow practice) up to 240+ BPM (advanced speed work).

**Q: How does auto-ramping work?**
A: You set a start BPM and a target BPM. The metronome automatically increases tempo at a set interval (e.g., every 2 minutes), progressively pushing your speed while maintaining clean technique.

**Q: What scales are included?**
A: C major, G major, D major, A major, E major, and B major — the 6 most practical keys for guitarists. Multiple fingering positions per scale.
